# @platform/adapters-sentry

Sentry adapter: error capture, performance tracing, and error monitoring implementation for the observability interface.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/adapters-sentry
Version: 0.1.0
Component: adapters-sentry
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: error-monitoring
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: adapter
Class: active.adapter
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Implement the observability error capture interface using the Sentry SDK
- Initialize Sentry with DSN, environment, and release metadata from config-runtime
- Attach structured context (user, request, trace ID) to error captures
- Configure sampling rates for performance monitoring per environment

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not define the observability interface (owned by observability)
- Does not implement distributed tracing spans (owned by adapters-opentelemetry)
- Does not own alerting rules or Sentry project configuration

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Initialized once at application startup to wire Sentry into the observability layer
- Never imported by feature or domain packages

application

## Operational notes

- DSN is resolved from config-runtime — never committed to source control
- Sentry source maps must be uploaded as part of the CI build pipeline
